Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event b4556e7d-41b4-566d-a890-69a3537ca85e ("Moran State Park"). Reason: results/schedule duplicate. Notes: Results heading and the Orcas Island schedule row describe the same 1993-05-16 event.

Reason: same-event duplicate with registration window written into title and venue. Notes: The May 16, 1993 Orcas event is one Moran State Park race, not a second row with 11am-12:30 registration text.
